Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jun-10-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
R. Michael Flynn, Esq., Flynn Law Office, 510-893-3226, michael@flo-law.com for Plaintiff Miriam Mansy,
Baldwin J. Lee, Esq.,ALLEN MATKINS LECK GAMBLE MALLORY & NATSIS LLP, (415) 837-1515,
blee@allenmatkins.com, for Defendant ORACLE AMERICA, INC.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ORACLE AMERICA, INC. Petition To Compel Arbitration

Defendant Oracle America, Inc.'s petition to compel arbitration is granted as to Plaintiff's non-sexual harassment claims.

(SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
